briefing:
**MORNING BRIEFING**
Tuesday, March 24, 2024

Good morning! Here's what needs your attention today.

**TOP PRIORITIES**

1. **Q1 Review Prep Materials** (boss@company.com)
   ACTION: Prepare materials by end of day for tomorrow's meeting. You have a 1-hour work block at 1:00 PM scheduled for this.

2. **API Integration Question** (bob@company.com)  
   ACTION: Answer Bob's technical question today - he's blocked on his work. You have a pairing session with him at 4:00 PM.

3. **Benefits Enrollment** (hr@company.com)
   ACTION: Complete enrollment by Friday to avoid coverage gaps. Handle this between meetings today.

**TODAY'S SCHEDULE**

• 9:00-9:30 AM — Team Standup (Zoom)
• 11:00-11:30 AM — 1:1 with Boss (Boss's Office)  
• 1:00-2:00 PM — Q1 Review Prep - Solo Work Block (Desk)
• 2:00-3:30 PM — Q1 Review Meeting (Conference Room B)
• 4:00-4:45 PM — API Integration Pairing Session (Zoom)
• 5:30-5:45 PM — End of Day Wrap-up (Desk)

**WATCH LIST**

• Contract renewal signature needed by March 28 (carol@partner.org)
• Project roadmap draft to review for Friday's meeting (alice@company.com)  
• System maintenance tonight 11 PM-2 AM (informational only)

Focus on the Q1 prep and benefits enrollment between your scheduled meetings. You've got this!
